word: H3179 - יָחַם - yâcham - yaw-kham' - Get heat

sections.paragraph:
Original: יחם

Transliteration: yâcham

Phonetic: yaw-kham'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be hot, conceive
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be hot, become hot
      2. to mate (of animals)
      3. to be or become hot (figuratively of anger)
    2. (Piel)
      1. to conceive (sexually)
      2. to be in heat (of animals)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 860

Part(s) of speech: Verb
